channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW10 problem, 7th April
item.description:

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone is moving out., 7th April
item.description:
Bed frame furniture tables, someone just dumped a whole bedroom set outside. Either moving in or out. Or they are just redecorating and needed new furniture and had no space.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71;73;75;77;79;81, St Peters Close, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 7th April
item.description:
15MDB CWPH 3000 X 800 X 78MM MARKED AS NUMBER 1 (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 7th April
item.description:
NWD WITH GIVE AND TAKE PLUS 15 MINUTES DELAY BOARDS PLEASE CUT BROKEN OFF TREE BRANCHE APPROX 4 METERS LONG HANGING DOWN ON GRASS VERGE TO MAKE SAFE (Damaged Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 7th April
item.description:
Damage from pothole
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 20 to 30 potholes in the road, 7th April
item.description:
There are a ridiculous number of potholes along this stretch or road, a few weeks back you painted around less than half of them, then last week you came a filled less then 10 of them. Some interest choices on how to fill the hole, in some cases, fill half of it and just leave the rest to crumble and take down the half attempt at filling the hole. Send an inspector to look at the shocking job that has been done here, these repairs will not last a month!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 7th April
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole 2000x600x55mm tarmac parch number 1 (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car has seemingly been left here, 7th April
item.description:
Looks like dirt all in the radiator at the front and hasn’t moved in nearly a month

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fieldcote Drive, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
